display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Incredible Journeys with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon looks back on wildlife stories he has discovered, from a giant tortoise sanctuary in the Seychelles to armed conservationists defending a forest in Belize.

programme.title: Incredible Journeys with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: A look at the challenge of preserving unspoilt wildernesses, from the icy expanses of Siberia to the tropical forests of central and South America.

programme.title: Incredible Journeys with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve presents highlights of his journeys around the world, and catches up with the people he met, including a Burmese undercover human rights campaigner.

programme.title: Incredible Journeys with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon recalls some of the most dangerous experiences of his travels, from coming under fire in war-torn Mogadishu to squaring off with a female wrestler in Mexico City.

programme.title: Incredible Journeys with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon looks back on wildlife stories he has discovered, from a giant tortoise sanctuary in the Seychelles to armed conservationists defending a forest in Belize.

programme.title: Incredible Journeys with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: A look at the challenge of preserving unspoilt wildernesses, from the icy expanses of Siberia to the tropical forests of central and South America.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: After The Liver Birds, Carla Lane returned to Liverpool for this family sitcom. When Billy injures his finger, the Boswell clan put squabbles aside and visit him in hospital.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Grandad is traumatised after his house is burgled. Meanwhile, Mrs Boswell seeks advice from a priest about her friendship with a man she met in the park.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Sitcom about a Liverpudlian family and their struggle to make ends meet. Mrs B hears shattering news on her birthday. Aveline gets a lecture on the responsibilities of motherhood.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom, one of the most popular programmes of the 1980s. Joey claims an incontinence allowance for Grandad. The first ever episode.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane of the 'Liver Birds' turned her attention back to Liverpool in the 1980s sitcom. Billy soon learns that opals are bad luck when he buys a ring for girlfriend Julie.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Laughs and some outrageous 80s fashions with the close-knit Liverpudlian family. Freddie's mistress leaves him, but he decides to pay her a visit anyway.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: After The Liver Birds, Carla Lane returned to Liverpool for this family sitcom. When Billy injures his finger, the Boswell clan put squabbles aside and visit him in hospital.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Grandad is traumatised after his house is burgled. Meanwhile, Mrs Boswell seeks advice from a priest about her friendship with a man she met in the park.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Sitcom about a Liverpudlian family and their struggle to make ends meet. Mrs B hears shattering news on her birthday. Aveline gets a lecture on the responsibilities of motherhood.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit Aberystwyth Arts Centre, where objects up for valuation include a set of Native Canadian carvings and a 19th-century musical curio.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce visits Seaton Delaval Hall in Northumberland, where items up for valuation include a wooden model that may be the world's first toy train.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: There's Hollywood glamour in the air as Derek heads out to pick up a Rolls Royce that once belonged to Fred Astaire.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Austin Healeys are classic British vehicles that are difficult to tame. Paul and Charlie have the chance to pick up a trio of these iconic cars in varying conditions.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The final death throes of the Third Reich described by Laurence Olivier. Hitler retreats to his bunker as Germany crumbles around him and Allied troops arrive in Berlin.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A Secret to Win the War: In 1942, a mysterious technology is facilitating a deadly Blitz. Desperate for answers, British intelligence sets its sights on an installation in Bruneval, France.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit Aberystwyth Arts Centre, where objects up for valuation include a set of Native Canadian carvings and a 19th-century musical curio.

programme.title: Dom Chinea's Cornish Workshop
programme.desc: Dom finishes the summer with new refurbished windows sealing the weather out of the workshop. Later, he and Sam head to St Agnes to buy Cornish tin to cast a workshop sign.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie crosses an epic aqueduct near Stratford-upon-Avon and gets stuck in a lock in central Birmingham.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming begins a new 170-mile journey across the north of England but soon runs into difficulty with a problem with his craft's propeller in Wigan.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming crosses the Pennines on the picturesque Leeds and Liverpool Canal before lending a hand to hire boaters in Gargrave in North Yorkshire.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming explores a Victorian village in West Yorkshire, moors up in Leeds Dock, and goes in search of an abandoned Aire and Calder Navigation waterway.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: There's Hollywood glamour in the air as Derek heads out to pick up a Rolls Royce that once belonged to Fred Astaire.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Austin Healeys are classic British vehicles that are difficult to tame. Paul and Charlie have the chance to pick up a trio of these iconic cars in varying conditions.

programme.title: Dead Ahead
programme.desc: Tensions are high in the Wharekoa whare as Amiria is determined to prove she’s not lying, but her journey of discovery leads her and the whānau to an emotional reunion. S1 E2

programme.title: Gladiators UK
programme.desc: Season Finale: In the 2025 grand final, four incredible finalists battle the Gladiators and give everything they’ve got in the Eliminator to be crowned this year’s Gladiators champion.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Host Andy Lee is joined in the studio by a panel of Australia's funniest comedians and a 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick.

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: On the third and final night of the Battles, the hopeful contestants compete for the remaining spots; one contestant may receive the last save from Adam.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie, an adventurous youngster who happens to be visually impaired, sets out with her best doggy friend Triggs to discover the music and adventure in the sounds of the world around them.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Mischief In Sherwood
programme.desc: Sherwood is in danger from the tyrannical Prince John! Teenage Robin and his merry band of outlaws fight back.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: Ninjago Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When two evil brothers manipulate the past and future to control all of Ninjago, the ninjas must retrieve the lost time blades to stop them.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran regrets encouraging Maxwell to hire a young TV star for his next play. S2 E11

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: Wikin te Taetae ni Kiribati on Fresh, lock in as Marewen Kiribati Youth Group tell us why they are Young, Gifted & Brown. And we Keep it Fresh with Samoan comedian Bubbah at her show Lonly Fans.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage is hurt.

programme.title: School Spirits
programme.desc: Maddie searches for clues on how to reunite with her body and Janet goes on the run. S2 E1

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: As Superintendent Donovan's journalist daughter investigates a murder on her university campus, the team must find the killer before someone else becomes the next victim.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A college dropout is murdered and the subsequent investigation leads Carrie and Al to an off-the-grid community on an abandoned island near Manhattan.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Jack faces a life-changing decision while investigating the murder of a man found dead in a boat off the Saint Marie coast.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars as Canada's answer to Sherlock in the Victorian mystery series. The head of a wealthy household is found face down in his porridge.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Cult mystery series with Yannick Bisson, set in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch looks for a missing girl in Paris and meets the man who inspired Maigret.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: A woman convicted of murdering her husband is given permission to help Patrick track down a killer, but she tries to charm him and make a bid for her freedom.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: As Superintendent Donovan's journalist daughter investigates a murder on her university campus, the team must find the killer before someone else becomes the next victim.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Sign of the Broken Sword: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric in the 1950s Cotswolds. Brown investigates a murder at the local army barracks and another at Dunkirk.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A college dropout is murdered and the subsequent investigation leads Carrie and Al to an off-the-grid community on an abandoned island near Manhattan.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Jack faces a life-changing decision while investigating the murder of a man found dead in a boat off the Saint Marie coast.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective at work on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. The team enter the world of island politics when the outgoing governor of Saint Marie is poisoned.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown races to save Bunty from the hangman's noose when she is tried for murder.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond The Lobby
programme.desc: Season Finale: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti visit Wilderness Hotel Inari, an adventure hotel above the Arctic Circle in Lapland.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: Season Finale: S2 E16 The fallout from George’s savage article is immediate. Terry’s true colours are revealed much to Hannah’s horror and a triple tragedy strikes Weld.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Fishing and Adventure
programme.desc: It's a big kingfish mission to the legendary Cape Maria Van Diemen where Scott and Mig are in search of a huge kingi to avoid a nasty consequence.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: A regenerative agriculture study looks at N-Loss from soils; the growth of downlands deer and transport; and, growing premium livestock and connections between art and agriculture at The Gullies.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A Fruitful Move: An Auckland couple move to a Roxburgh orchard to make a new life growing apricots, cherries and apples, and turning the waste fruit into cider and liqueurs.

programme.title: Well Traveller
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Host Layne Beachley guides a 43-year-old busy mum on a Sydney wellness escape to slow down, rediscover her purpose, and reconnect. S2 E1

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Find My Country House Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa have got Christmas covered with some classic dishes to serve up for the festive season that include two family recipes they cannot wait to share with us.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Australia
programme.desc: Rick explores the vast plains of Moree and Bourke, gateway to the Australian outback, and the food heritage of its resilient and pioneering farm communities.
